steps.caption: Landing page
steps.sub: The feature entry point — a visitor arrives at Acme.

steps.caption: Contact form opened
steps.sub: Clicking “Get in touch” routes to the contact form.

steps.caption: Inline validation
steps.sub: Submitting empty surfaces field-level errors — no bad data reaches the API.

steps.caption: Form completed
steps.sub: A valid enquiry filled in and ready to send.

steps.caption: Submission confirmed
steps.sub: POST /api/contact succeeds; the user lands on a confirmation with a ticket id.

steps.caption: Appears in submissions
steps.sub: The backend admin list shows the new submission — end-to-end proof.
